title: Set of 2 Black Iron Trivet Trays
description: Set of 2 Black Iron Trivet Trays Enhance your kitchen decor and protect your countertops with the Set of 2 Black Iron Trivet Trays. These versatile accessories provide a stylish and functional solution for safely placing hot pots, pans, and dishes, while adding a touch of sophistication to your culinary space. Key Features: Two Sizes Included: This set includes two trivet trays in different sizes to accommodate various cookware. The small tray measures approximately 18x18x1.5cm, while the large tray measures approximately 23x23x1.5cm, offering versatility and flexibility for different cooking needs. Sturdy Iron Construction: Crafted from 100% iron, these trivet trays provide a stable and heat-resistant surface for placing hot pots, pans, and dishes, protecting your countertops and tabletops from damage. Sleek Black Finish: The matte black finish adds a modern and sophisticated touch to the trivet trays, elevating the aesthetic appeal of your kitchen decor and seamlessly blending with any style or theme. Multipurpose Use: Whether you're serving a sizzling skillet at the dinner table or placing a hot baking dish on the kitchen counter, these trivet trays provide reliable support and protection for all your culinary creations. Lightweight and Portable: Despite their durable construction, the trivet trays are lightweight and easy to handle, allowing for convenient storage when not in use and effortless transport from the kitchen to the dining area. Easy to Clean: Simply wipe the trivet trays clean with a damp cloth or sponge after each use to remove any food residue or spills, ensuring that they remain hygienic and ready for your next cooking adventure. Product Specifications: Small Trivet Tray: Approx. 18x18x1.5cm Large Trivet Tray: Approx. 23x23x1.5cm Weight (Approx.): 300g (for both trays) Material Breakdown: 100% Iron
